pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh which explicitly defines OUTPUT_PATH as this directory.
Found in verifier.py logic where output_size_kb >= min_file_size_kb contributes to the final score.

privileged_info_summary: The underlying dataset consists of real public X-Ray Angiography (XA) DICOM samples (e.g. 0002.DCM or 0003.DCM) downloaded directly from Rubo Medical's dicom_files archive during environment setup. The task strictly expects the screenshot output to be saved at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/lens_inspection.png' and enforces a minimum file size of 50 KB to ensure a valid, non-empty image capture.
